emails.subject: Terrorist attacks
emails.body: Terrorist attacks I know that as a result of yesterday's national tragedy, there are many of you stranded throughout the U.S....Please check with the Enron websites= and Travel Agency in the Park( open 24 hours) for information on how best to get home- Please feel free to utilize all reasonable and safe ways to r= eturn home...you will be reimbursed for such efforts. Please also feel free= to extend your stays as necessary until you are comfortable returning home= There isn't much more to say about yesterday's events that hasn't already= been said they are tragic beyond an imaginable level...but, the fact tha= t each of you and your family's are safe is very important to me and many others. This event will be with us for a long time to come, but a sense of normalcy will, in time, return to our business and what we do in Government= Affairs..but,in the meantime, stay safe, enjoy your families, and get hom= e when you can if you are away. Feel free to call me at 281-831-3749 if the= re is anything at all I can do to help.

emails.body: RE: Terrorist attacks Rick, This is the nicest e:mail. I know those receiving this e:mail appreciate y= our kind thoughts and words. Ginger Dernehl Administrative Coordinator Global Government Affairs Phone# 713-853-7751 Fax# 713-646-8160
